infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OnStreak uses the camera so you can take daily accountability photos for your group.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OnStreak needs access to your photo library so you can select progress photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OnStreak can save your progress photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OnStreak does not record audio; this permission is required by the camera module.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: OnStreak does not track you across apps.
